# Fern's Homemade Soft Pretzels

> Hand-rolled, made-fresh-daily soft pretzels sold at The Greater Bridgeton Amish Farm Market in Bridgeton, New Jersey.

Fern's Homemade Soft Pretzels is a small local business run by Merv Esh. Pretzels are hand-rolled and baked fresh each market day in a variety of flavors. No online ordering — pretzels are only available in person at the market stall.

## Business details

- **Location:** The Greater Bridgeton Amish Farm Market, 2 Cassidy Court, Bridgeton, NJ 08302
- **Owner:** Merv Esh

## Pages

- [Home](https://fernspretzels.com/): Product overview, gallery, hours, location map, and owner introduction.
- [Privacy Policy](https://fernspretzels.com/privacy-policy/): Privacy disclosures for the website.
